name: uspec
description: Automate design system documentation — from Figma to finished specs. Generate API specs, color annotations, structure specs, screen reader specs, motion specs, component anatomy, and changelogs directly from Figma files.
author: Ian Guisard

agents.name: anatomy
agents.description: Element classification and annotation specialist. Enriches component elements with semantic roles and human-readable notes before rendering anatomy specifications.

agents.name: api
agents.description: Component API documentation specialist. Analyzes UI components and outputs structured JSON documenting configurable properties, sub-component configurations, and example configurations.

agents.name: changelog
agents.description: Changelog documentation specialist. Tracks and documents component changes, updates, and version history.

agents.name: color
agents.description: Design token mapping specialist. Documents color annotations mapping UI elements to design tokens across variants and states.

agents.name: motion
agents.description: Animation specification specialist. Generates motion specifications with timeline data and easing details from After Effects animations.

agents.name: screen-reader
agents.description: Accessibility specialist. Generates screen reader specifications for VoiceOver, TalkBack, and ARIA accessibility standards.

agents.name: structure
agents.description: Structural specification specialist. Documents component dimensions, spacing, padding, and how values change across density, size, and shape variants.

skills.name: create-anatomy
skills.description: Generate a visual anatomy annotation in Figma showing numbered markers on a component instance with an attribute table.

skills.name: create-api
skills.description: Generate API overview specifications documenting component properties, values, defaults, and configuration examples.

skills.name: create-changelog
skills.description: Generate a new changelog for a component or design system file with the first entry.

skills.name: update-changelog
skills.description: Add new entries directly to an existing changelog in Figma using MCP tools.

skills.name: convert-changelog
skills.description: Convert an existing Figma changelog into structured JSON format.

skills.name: create-color
skills.description: Generate color annotation specifications mapping UI elements to design tokens.

skills.name: create-motion
skills.description: Generate motion specification annotations from After Effects timeline data.

skills.name: create-property
skills.description: Generate a visual property annotation in Figma showing each configurable property axis with component instance previews.

skills.name: create-structure
skills.description: Generate structure specifications documenting component dimensions, spacing, padding, and variant changes.

skills.name: create-voice
skills.description: Generate screen reader accessibility specifications for VoiceOver, TalkBack, and ARIA.

skills.name: setup-library
skills.description: Configure uSpec with your Figma template library.

servers.name: figma-console
servers.description: Required for connecting to Figma files and extracting component data
